declarations.description:
Purpose: Display checkbox groups with optional legends, hints, and error messages
Category: Forms, Actions
When to use: Forms, Surveys, User preferences
When not to use: Decorative purposes, Non-interactive elements
Works with components: mc-checkbox, mc-card, mc-modal, mc-drawer
Alternative component names: User Checkbox Group, Checkbox List, Selection Box Group
declarations.name: McCheckboxGroup

cssParts.description: The container of the fieldset that holds the checkboxes.
cssParts.name: `fieldset-container`

slots.description: One or more <mc-checkbox> elements to display in the group.
The legend HTML to use for the mc-checkbox-group.
slots.name: `legend`

slots.description: The hint HTML to use for the mc-checkbox-group.
slots.name: `hint`

slots.description: The errormessage HTML to use for the mc-checkbox-group.
slots.name: `errormessage`

events.description: Fired when any checkbox in the group is checked/unchecked.
events.name: change
